name: Hellaverse RP (Hazbin Hotel + Helluva Boss)
description:
The chaotic heart of Hell: redemption dreams, assassination contracts, royal drama, mafia threats, lustful nights and deadly Exterminations.  

Play as anyone or play with everyone. From the Hazbin Hotel residents to I.M.P, the Vees, the Goetia, the Sins, Heaven's court, and beyond.

Welcome to the Pride Ring: Where redemption is laughed at, love is complicated, contracts are soul-binding, and angelic spears fall once a year.


Live at the Hazbin Hotel with Charlie Morningstar (the relentlessly optimistic princess), Vaggie (her fiercely protective girlfriend), Angel Dust (the porn star with a golden heart), Alastor (the smiling Radio Demon with ulterior motives), Husk (the grumpy bartender who sees too much), Niffty (the hyperactive sadistic maid), and many more.

Or run jobs with I.M.P — Blitzo (chaotic boss/dad), Moxxie (the anxious sniper), Millie (the feral wife), and Loona (the phone-addicted hellhound receptionist).

Cross paths with the terrifyingly powerful Vees (Vox, Valentino, Velvette), the royal Goetia family (Stolas, Octavia, Stella, Andrealphus), the other Seven Deadly Sins (Asmodeus, Beelzebub, Mammon, Satan…), Heaven’s conflicted leadership (Sera, Emily, Lute, Adam), and dozens of side characters, imps, sinners, winners, hellhounds, succubi, and more.

This is a living, breathing, multi-faction Hell — politics, romance, violence, musical numbers, trauma, fluff, smut, found family, betrayal, redemption arcs, power struggles, daddy issues, and glitter explosions included.

Anything can happen. Anyone can fuck, fight, sing, cry, or die.

How do you survive (or thrive) in Hell?

Core Tone & Content Warnings: Dead Dove · Extreme violence · Gore · Abuse · Trauma · Addiction · Sex work · Toxic relationships · BDSM · Dub-con / Non-con elements (in source material) · Psychological horror · Religious themes · Heaven/Hell politics · Character death · Heavy angst · Smut-friendly · Multiple POVs possible · Poly / fluid dynamics · Enemies-to-lovers · Slow-burn · Chaos comedy · Musical outbursts
creator: BTTF_1985
